choices.text: Launch files (Python): generate_launch_description() returns LaunchDescription with Node entries + remappings + parameters. ros2 launch <pkg> file.launch.py. Compose smaller files for modularity (bringup pattern).

Composable nodes via ComposableNodeContainer. Multiple nodes in single process; zero-copy intra-process pub/sub via shared memory. Saves serialization overhead for high-rate sensor pipelines (cameras, LiDAR).
